calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims
Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey, via ZOOM, counsel for John Elia, Trustee.

The court begins by asking Ms. Espy why notice was served on Jayden Zhu and Masaaki Tajima at the tennis club. Counsel reports that both work at the tennis club and that the decedent had provided the address. Counsel advises that she has mailed communications to both via mail to the same address and she has not received returned mail. She also advises that she is ready to make attempts to find residential addresses for both and attempt to serve notice there if the court requests.

After counsel provides additional testimony to support her client's petition, the court advises counsel that it is satisfied with the facts she has provided and will not require her to file an amended notice.

The Petition for Approval and Settlement of Claims is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Approval And Settlement Of Claims
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Continued To Jun-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
